Changed_Other.name: DFFlagDataStoreEnableModernRequestThrottling_PlaceFilter

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the request limit for data stores with a filter for specific universes.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves data management for games by allowing better organization of player data across different universes.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Sets limits on how many data requests a player can make based on the game universe.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances performance by preventing overload from excessive data requests.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Establishes a fixed limit on read requests from data stores per player.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures that players can access their data without overwhelming the system.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of data store read requests per player, filtered by universe.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance by reducing server load for players accessing data.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the request limit for removing ordered data in data stores with a universe filter.
Changed_Other.purpose: Allows developers to manage data more efficiently, improving game performance.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many remove requests can be made for player data in a universe.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps manage data more effectively, preventing overload and ensuring smoother gameplay.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the limit on data store requests for specific universes.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother data handling for games with many players.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many write requests a player can make to data stores.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps manage server load and ensures fair access to data storage for all players.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the request limit for data stores with a universe filter applied.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves data retrieval efficiency for games with multiple universes, enhancing performance.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of data store requests per player with a filter for universes.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures fair usage of data storage and prevents overload, maintaining game performance.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the request limits for reading data from the datastore with a filter for universes.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves data retrieval efficiency for games, leading to smoother gameplay.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many data store requests a player can make based on the game universe.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves game performance by controlling data requests, ensuring smoother gameplay.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Removes the limit on data requests for specific universes in data storage.
Changed_Other.purpose: Allows developers to manage player data more effectively without restrictions.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Removes the limit on how many data requests can be made per player in a game.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enables more complex and personalized game experiences without hitting request limits.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many write requests can be made to the data store for each universe.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps maintain performance by preventing overload, ensuring smoother gameplay for players.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of write requests each player can make to the data store.
